name: C2xTestWaitForMessage
title: C2xTestWaitForMessage
syntax: long C2xTestWaitForMessage(char* appMsg, long aTimeout) // form 1
long C2xTestWaitForMessage(char* appMsg, char* stationName, long aTimeout) // form 2
description: Waits for the occurrence of the first Car2x message matching the conditions passed as arguments. Should the message not occur before the expiration of the time aTimeout, the wait condition is resolved nevertheless.

parameters.name: appMsg
parameters.description: Name of application message of the Car2x message that should be awaited.

parameters.name: stationName
parameters.description: Name of the sender station of the Car2x message that should be awaited.

parameters.name: aTimeout
parameters.description: Maximum time that should be waited [ms]. Transmission of 0: no timeout controlling

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
